CSN.pure_variation: delta g_ab=2 sigma g_ab gives Theta=0
CSN.ruling: bare C2 boundary phase space retains the common-scale null direction

Noether_two_form.bare_Q: Q_xi^{mu nu}=-4 C^{mu nu rho sigma} nabla_rho xi_sigma+8 xi_sigma nabla_rho C^{mu nu rho sigma}
Noether_two_form.open: overall coefficient; integrability; primitive; reference; orientation; corner improvement; physical normalization

CLAMPED_TWO_JET.fixed: delta h=0; delta K=0; compatible corner delta h=0

CONFORMAL_CLASS.fixed: trace-free boundary conformal data as declared

K_FIXED_PLUS_NATURAL_PI.extra_equation: Pi_h=0 plus corner rule if delta h free

MIXED_OR_NEUMANN_AFTER_COMPLETION.extra_equation: depends on added integrable boundary/Legendre functional

conformally_flat_branch.ruling: bare C2 boundary objects do not select scale or yield normalized mass/charge

covariant_variation.normalization: overall action coefficient and sign convention remain conditional
covariant_variation.potential: Theta^mu=4 C^{mu a b nu} nabla_nu(delta g_ab)-4 nabla_nu C^{mu a b nu} delta g_ab

curvature_momentum.ruling: derived by exact finite-difference curvature-tensor tests

non_null_Gaussian_decomposition.Pi_h: 8 epsilon E^{k(i}K_k^{j)}-4 epsilon nabla_nu C^{n i j nu}-4 epsilon D_k C^{n i j k}
non_null_Gaussian_decomposition.conventions: g_nn=epsilon; delta g_nn=delta g_ni=0; K_ij=(1/2)partial_n h_ij; E^ij=C^{n i n j}
non_null_Gaussian_decomposition.corner_flux: 4 epsilon s_k C^{n i j k} delta h_ij
non_null_Gaussian_decomposition.normal_flux: n.Theta=-8 epsilon E^ij delta K_ij + Pi_h^ij delta h_ij + 4 epsilon D_k(C^{n i j k}delta h_ij)

scope.open: null/moving/signature-changing wall; full corner topology; added completion; physical data; representative; scale; source; EH bridge

selector_ruling.smallest_missing_boundary_selector: native rule choosing the allowed boundary variation/polarization and corner data; charge additionally needs primitive/reference/normalization
